sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: O God, come to my assistance; O Lord, make haste to help me! You are my rescuer, my help; O Lord, do not delay.

sections.author: Ben Walther - SP2025
sections.snippet: If today you hear his voice, harden not your hearts.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

sections.title: Make your home in me
sections.author: Ben Walther
sections.snippet: Every fox, a den; every bird, a nest; but the Son of Man has no place to rest. Every heart, a man; every king, a throne; but the Word Made Flesh, no earthly home.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: I am the bread of life, says the Lord; whoever comes to me will not hunger and whoever believes in me will not thirst.

sections.title: Ang Katawan ni Kristo
sections.author: Ricky Manalo, Pia de Leon
sections.snippet: In the presence of our God, as we gather here in Christ, feel the Spirit breathe upon us, the breath of life, graced and divine. We have come to break the bread; we have come to share our lives. Let us bring these fruits to the table, the love of God, yours and mine!

sections.title: Remembrance
sections.author: Matt Maher, Matt Redman
sections.snippet: Oh how could it be that my God would welcome me, into this mystery. Say take this bread, take this wine, now the simple made divine, for any to receive. By mercy, we come to your table. By your grace, you are making us faithful

sections.title: Ablaze
sections.author: Jonas Myrin / Matt Redman
sections.snippet: By his grace we are conceived to be mercy, to be peace, to be light amidst the darkness. In his image we are made to be brilliant, to be great, to present the world his likeness.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
